svg.text: Phase 2 — TypeAST mostly unchanged — one note
Note: generic_args now used in NamedTypeAST, CallExprAST (generic call), ImplDeclAST, and TraitDeclAST — no new node needed, but the field is now load-bearing.
Phase 3 — DeclAST two nodes updated, one renamed
Phase 4 — ExprAST biggest section of changes
Key design decisions — what changed and why

g.text: Member access split into two nodes
semantic rules differ — never reassignable vs data field
old: IDENTIFIER | Type:method | field.fn | fn()! | anon
Type:method and field.fn now resolve via postfix, not step
not just a variant of method_decl
enables TypeName(expr) dispatch at use sites

svg.text: isBehaviorMember : bool — set on BehaviorAccessExprAST, blocks reassignment in semantic pass
genericInstantiation : Map<string, TypeAST>? — resolved at call site for generic funcs/structs

g.text: step now just IDENTIFIER — resolved by semantic
